title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Freshworks - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Freshworks - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Backend Developer looking for your next big career move? Freshworks in Srinagar offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Freshworks:
Freshworks is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Freshworks!
